visual: Nearly all weight on the rear bent leg while the front foot rests lightly with only the toe or heel touching the floor.
motion_description: The person starts with their weight on the back left leg and the front right foot resting lightly on the floor. Both arms, initially raised at chest height with slightly bent elbows, slowly lower in front of the body to rest at the sides. Simultaneously, the right foot steps back beside the left foot, shifting the weight to an even, neutral standing position. The entire movement is performed at a slow, continuous tempo.
